title: dactylorchis majalis
intro: Dactylorchis majalis, also known as Spiranthes autumnalis, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding in digestion and reducing fever. The herbal preparation of Dactylorchis majalis typically involves drying and processing the plant's roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
